---
title: "Roberto Ruiz"
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
::: {.profile-left}
![](../images/equipo/roberto.jpg){.profile-photo-large}

::: {.profile-links}
[✉](mailto:roberto.ruiz@posgrado.ecologia.edu.mx)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-right}
**PhD Student**  
Instituto de Ecología, A.C. (INECOL)

*Interests:* [Bats]{.profile-tag} [Bioacoustics]{.profile-tag} [Macroecology]{.profile-tag} [Landscape Ecology]{.profile-tag} [Science outreach]{.profile-tag}

I am a biology graduate from the Faculty of Sciences of the Autonomous University of San Luis Potosí and a Master of Science from INECOL. My main interest is the study of bats: their bioacoustics, movement through the landscape, macroecological patterns, and conservation. In my PhD at INECOL, I aim to describe knowledge gaps in bat functional traits and how these gaps affect our understanding of their macroecological patterns and conservation. I am also a strong promoter of science outreach and art as a means of communicating science.

### Education

- **PhD** — Instituto de Ecología, A.C. (ongoing)
- **MSc** — Instituto de Ecología, A.C. (2023)
- **BSc** — Universidad Autónoma de San Luis Potosí (2020)
:::
:::

::: {.profile-back}
[← Back to Team](../equipo.html)
:::
